program.name: Intermedio · Definición
program.description: 5 días/sem alta intensidad. Para bajar % graso conservando masa magra.

exercises.name: dips_parallel
exercises.note: Inclinarse ligeramente al frente para más pecho

exercises.name: wide_pushup
exercises.note: Manos más abiertas que los hombros

exercises.name: triceps_stretch
exercises.note: Codo detrás de la cabeza, cada lado

exercises.name: pullup_strict
exercises.note: Agarre prono, mentón sobre la barra

exercises.name: australian_pullup
exercises.note: Pecho a la barra, cuerpo recto

exercises.name: scap_retract
exercises.note: Colgado en barra, solo retraer escápulas

exercises.name: face_pull
exercises.note: Con banda o en barra baja, codos altos

exercises.name: lat_stretch
exercises.note: Brazo extendido, inclinarse al lado opuesto

exercises.name: pectoral_stretch
exercises.note: Estiramiento de pecho y hombro frontal

exercises.name: glute_bridge_warmup
exercises.note: Apretar glúteos arriba, activar cadena posterior

exercises.name: reverse_lunge
exercises.note: Paso largo, rodilla trasera casi al suelo

exercises.name: nordic_curl
exercises.note: Descenso lento y controlado, empujar para subir

exercises.name: quad_stretch
exercises.note: De pie, talón al glúteo, cada pierna

exercises.name: hip_flexor_stretch
exercises.note: Rodilla en suelo, empujar cadera al frente

days.workout_title: Tren superior · Empuje y jalón combinado

exercises.name: shoulder_dislocates
exercises.note: Con palo o banda, rango completo

exercises.name: wide_pullup
exercises.note: Agarre amplio, jalar codos hacia abajo

exercises.name: decline_pushup
exercises.note: Pies elevados en banco o escalón

exercises.name: lat_stretch
exercises.note: Cada lado, inclinarse hasta sentir estiramiento

exercises.name: inchworm
exercises.note: Caminar manos al frente y volver

exercises.name: v_ups
exercises.note: Manos a pies, extensión completa abajo

exercises.name: hip_flexor_stretch
exercises.note: Cada lado, empujar cadera al frente

exercises.name: deep_breathing
exercises.note: Vuelta a la calma, 5 respiraciones profundas

exercises.name: dips_parallel
exercises.note: Superset con diamond pushup, sin descanso entre ambos

exercises.name: pectoral_stretch
exercises.note: Cada lado contra pared o marco

exercises.name: shoulder_dislocates
exercises.note: Rango completo con banda o palo

exercises.name: goblet_squat
exercises.note: Superset con jump squat. Tempo lento 3-1-1

exercises.name: skaters
exercises.note: Parte 2 del superset. Salto lateral controlado

exercises.name: tuck_jumps
exercises.note: Finisher: rodillas al pecho en el salto

exercises.name: handstand_wall
exercises.note: Panza a la pared, apretar core

exercises.name: clapping_pushup
exercises.note: Superset con dips. Explosivo, aterrizar suave

exercises.name: hindu_pushup
exercises.note: Movimiento fluido de perro a cobra

exercises.name: diamond_pushup
exercises.note: Último set al fallo, quemar tríceps

exercises.name: scap_retract
exercises.note: Parte 2 del superset. Colgado, solo escápulas

exercises.name: windshield_wipers
exercises.note: Colgado en barra, piernas lado a lado

exercises.name: squat_pause
exercises.note: Superset con tuck jumps. Pausa 3s abajo

exercises.name: tuck_jumps
exercises.note: Parte 2 del superset. Rodillas al pecho

exercises.name: skaters
exercises.note: Parte 2 del superset. Más volumen que fase 2

exercises.name: handstand_wall
exercises.note: Más tiempo que fase 2, panza a pared

exercises.name: burpees
exercises.note: Superset con pullup. Pecho al suelo

exercises.name: jump_squat
exercises.note: Parte 2 del superset. Más reps que fase 2

exercises.name: high_knees
exercises.note: Finisher final del programa. Darlo TODO

exercises.name: deep_breathing
exercises.note: Vuelta a la calma. Programa completado
